headline: Will Constellation's Long-Term Nuclear PPAs Drive Sustainable Growth?
summary: CEG's long-term nuclear PPAs with Walmart and Meta highlight rising demand for carbon-free power and may support earnings and cash flow.

headline: AI fuels record $200bn M&A boom in US power sector
summary: The AI boom is fuelling a record surge in dealmaking in the US power and utility industry, as companies compete for capital to build energy infrastructure...
